name: Easy-Oven Rice with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken consomme (canned - do not dilute)
1 can (4 oz.) mushrooms, drained and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients in an oven-proof Pyrex dish.
2. Cover with aluminum foil.
3. Cook in a 350 degree oven for one hour.
4. Serves 6 people.
